problem id: 6189ce10
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11000000 -> 00001100
  11101001 -> 10001110
  00101101 -> 10000010
  00111001 -> 10000011
  00110001 -> 10000011
  10010100 -> 00001001
  01011110 -> 00000101
  00001101 -> 10000000

query: 11101000
predicted answer: 00001110
